severity_reason: dark vessel (no AIS broadcast) detected by SAR

explanation.method: Sentinel-1 SAR, Allen Institute open detector (Apache-2.0), run on demand by SeaVigil.
drivers: no AIS broadcast matched at acquisition (dark)

caveats: A SAR detection is a radar blip: it has a position and a size, not an identity.
Length, heading and the fishing-vessel class are model estimates, not ground truth.
Dark means no AIS broadcast matched at the acquisition time; without an AIS feed the broadcasting status is unverified, not assumed.
An inspection lead, not proof of illegal activity.

caveats: A SAR detection is a radar blip: it has a position and a size, not an identity.
Length, heading and the fishing-vessel class are model estimates, not ground truth.
Dark means no AIS broadcast matched at the acquisition time; without an AIS feed the broadcasting status is unverified, not assumed.
An inspection lead, not proof of illegal activity.
